creator: am@mivitec.de
text:
Please add on the site 
http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html
the following information:

(1)
HANDTAKE GmbH is a service provider for Open Source solutions based in Munich. We provide a full range of services (consulting services, system administration, support, programming) for Linux, *BSD and other Open Source software. 
For further information please contact freebsd@handtake.de or visit our website www.handtake.de


(2)
"MIVITEC GmbH Niederlassung Muenchen" is a provides full redundant hosting infrastructure in 3 datacenters in Munich. For our client we provide IT management, network security, Linux, BSD and MacOS X system administration services. We have big experience of implementing high availability services, cluster systems and hosting infrastructures. These services are provided for cliets in our datacenters as well as in your company's datacenter, even in other cities in Germany and Austria. For more information please call us at +49 89 420797870, send us an email (freebsd@mivitec.de) or visit our website www.mivitec.de. You are also invited to visit us in Munich, so that we can discuss your FreeBSD based projects.
